descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.rationale: controls strength, ductility via Hall-Petch relationship

representation.notes: log-scale often used for wide ranges

quality.loss_reason: reduces full distribution to single value
quality.notes: mean, median, mode yield different values

descriptors.name: grain boundary character
descriptors.physical_meaning: fraction of special low-energy grain boundaries
descriptors.rationale: influences corrosion resistance and crack propagation

representation.notes: can expand to distribution over Σ values

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.rationale: affects anisotropic mechanical and physical properties

representation.notes: full ODF needs truncated harmonic expansion

quality.loss_reason: reduces ODF to single intensity metric
quality.notes: loses texture component and symmetry information

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: line length of dislocations per volume
descriptors.rationale: indicates work hardening state and strength

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: ratio of longest to shortest grain dimension
descriptors.rationale: indicates processing history and directional properties

quality.loss_reason: reduces grain shape distribution to average
quality.notes: loses orientation and spatial arrangement information
